html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D2.DT.Hepatitis B.Birth dose decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Client is due for hepatitis B monovalent vaccine
Client is due for hepatitis B monovalent vaccine Guidance
Client should follow delayed-start decision logic
Client should follow delayed-start decision logic Guidance
Client is not due for the hepatitis B birth dose
Client is not due for the hepatitis B birth dose Guidance
